pushCmd: cd /data/workspace/gaff && git add -A && git commit -m 'feat: ${TASK_ID} - ${TASK_TITLE}' && git push origin main
techStack: Next.js 16, Tailwind v4 (@import 'tailwindcss' + @theme), TypeScript, Prisma 5, PostgreSQL, jose (JWT), bcryptjs
authPattern: JWT via jose, cookie name gaff-token, use getTokenFromRequest() for API routes, getCurrentUser() for server components. See src/lib/auth.ts

tasks.title: Error handling and loading states
tasks.description: Create custom 404 and 500 error pages. Add a reusable Toast notification component (success/error/info) that can be triggered from anywhere. Create a global toast context provider. Style: clean white with gaff-teal accent, matching the rest of the site.
acceptanceCriteria: Custom not-found.tsx page at app level with helpful message and link home
Custom error.tsx page at app level with retry button
Toast component with success/error/info variants, auto-dismiss after 5s
ToastProvider wrapping the app in layout.tsx
useToast() hook for triggering toasts from client components
Build passes

tasks.title: Mobile-responsive navbar with auth state
tasks.description: The Navbar needs proper mobile optimization: hamburger menu that slides in, auth-aware (show login/register when logged out, show dashboard/messages/logout when logged in), role-aware dashboard link. Currently the navbar exists but mobile UX is poor.
acceptanceCriteria: Hamburger menu on mobile (<768px) with slide-in panel
Shows user name and role when logged in
Login/Register buttons when logged out
Dashboard link changes label based on role (My Properties for landlord, My Dashboard for tenant, Portfolio for agent)
Messages link with unread badge (already exists, ensure it works on mobile)
Smooth open/close animation
Build passes

tasks.title: User profile page with edit mode
tasks.description: Build a public profile page at /user/[id] and a profile edit page at /dashboard/profile. Public profile shows: name, avatar, role, member since, verification badges, trust score. For landlords: active listings, response rate. For tenants: bio, preferences summary. Edit mode: update name, phone, bio, avatar URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Public profile page at /user/[id] with role-appropriate content
Profile edit page at /dashboard/profile
API route GET/PUT /api/users/[id]/profile
Displays verification badges and trust score
Landlord profile shows their active listings
Edit form saves via PUT
Build passes

tasks.title: Search sort and URL state persistence
tasks.description: The search page needs: (1) sorting that actually works (newest, price asc, price desc — currently the sort select exists but doesn't send to API), (2) URL state — all filter values should sync to URL params so searches are shareable/bookmarkable, and (3) the API needs to accept a sort parameter.
acceptanceCriteria: API accepts ?sort=newest|price_asc|price_desc and orders results accordingly
Search page syncs all filter state to URL params (location, minPrice, maxPrice, bedrooms, propertyType, listingType, hapAccepted, petsAllowed, parking, furnished, berRating, sort)
URL params are read on page load to restore filters
Clicking browser back restores previous search
Build passes

tasks.title: Listing status lifecycle and freshness
tasks.description: Implement listing freshness: (1) listings auto-expire after 30 days (cron or check on read), (2) landlords get a 'Renew' button on expired listings, (3) stale listing indicator on cards older than 14 days ('Listed 3 weeks ago' in amber), (4) recently listed badge for <3 days.
acceptanceCriteria: Listings older than 30 days automatically marked EXPIRED (via API check or background job)
Renew button on dashboard for expired listings (resets createdAt, sets ACTIVE)
ListingCard shows 'New' badge for listings < 3 days old
ListingCard shows amber 'Listed X weeks ago' for listings > 14 days
Build passes

tasks.title: Smart matching integration with tenant preferences
tasks.description: Wire up the matching.ts library to use real tenant preferences from TenantPreference model. When a tenant views a listing, show a match percentage based on their preferences. On the tenant dashboard, show top 5 recommended listings. The recommended API at /api/listings/recommended should use actual preference data.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/listings/recommended returns listings ranked by match score for the authenticated tenant
Match score calculated from: budget fit, location match, bedroom match, amenity overlap (must-haves vs nice-to-haves)
Listing detail page shows 'X% match' badge for logged-in tenants with preferences set
Tenant dashboard 'AI Matches' section shows top 5 recommended listings with scores
Build passes

tasks.title: Read receipts and response time tracking
tasks.description: Add read receipts to the messaging system and track landlord/agent response times. (1) When a user opens a conversation, mark messages as read (already partially done). (2) Show read status (double tick) on sent messages. (3) Track average response time per user. (4) Display response time on landlord/agent profile ('Usually responds within 2 hours').
acceptanceCriteria: Messages have a readAt timestamp field (add to schema if missing)
When recipient opens conversation, unread messages marked as read with timestamp
Sent messages show single tick (sent) or double tick (read) indicators
API calculates average response time for a user
Landlord/agent profile card shows 'Usually responds within X hours'
Build passes

tasks.title: Viewing scheduler
tasks.description: Build a viewing scheduling system. Landlords/agents create available viewing slots for a listing. Tenants can book a slot. Both parties get confirmation. (1) API for creating/listing/booking viewing slots. (2) Viewing slots section on listing detail page. (3) My viewings section on tenant dashboard. (4) Viewing management on landlord dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: ViewingSlot model added to Prisma schema (listingId, dateTime, duration, maxAttendees, bookedBy[])
API: POST /api/listings/[id]/viewings (create slot - landlord/agent), GET (list slots), POST /api/viewings/[id]/book (book - tenant)
Listing detail page shows available viewing slots with 'Book viewing' button
Tenant dashboard shows upcoming viewings
Landlord dashboard shows upcoming viewings with attendee list
Build passes

tasks.title: Full-text search
tasks.description: Implement full-text search across listing titles, descriptions, and addresses. Add a search input to the search page that filters by keyword in addition to the existing filters. Use Prisma's fullTextSearch or raw SQL with PostgreSQL's to_tsvector.
acceptanceCriteria: Search page has a text input for keyword search
API accepts ?q=keyword parameter
Searches across title, description, addressLine1, city
Results ranked by relevance
Keyword highlighted or bolded in results (nice-to-have)
Build passes

tasks.title: Email notifications for new matching listings
tasks.description: When a new listing is created that matches a tenant's preferences (>= 70% match score), send them an email notification via AgentMail. Respect the tenant's alertFrequency preference (instant/daily/weekly). For instant: send immediately. For daily/weekly: skip (would need a batch job, out of scope for now — just implement instant).
acceptanceCriteria: After listing creation, check all tenants with preferences set
For tenants with alertFrequency='instant' and emailAlerts=true, calculate match score
If match >= 70%, send email via AgentMail API with listing details and link
Email includes: listing title, price, location, match percentage, link to listing
Rate limit: max 10 notification emails per new listing (prevent spam on popular areas)
Build passes

tasks.title: Agent organization profiles and team management
tasks.description: Build agent organization features. Agents belong to an agency (AgentOrg). Agency has a profile page showing all their listings, team members, and reviews. Agency admin can invite team members.
acceptanceCriteria: Agency profile page at /agency/[id] showing: name, logo, description, team members, all listings, average rating
API: GET /api/agencies/[id], POST /api/agencies (create), PUT /api/agencies/[id] (update)
Agent dashboard shows agency info and team members
Agent can create an agency from their dashboard if they don't belong to one
Build passes
tasks.notes: AgentOrg and AgentOrgMember models already exist in schema

tasks.title: Admin dashboard with analytics
tasks.description: Build an admin dashboard at /admin showing: total users (by role), total listings (by status), total messages, total verifications (by status), recent reports, recent flagged listings. Simple stat cards + recent activity feed.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard at /admin with stat cards
Stats: total users (breakdown by role), total listings (by status), messages sent, verifications pending/completed
Recent activity feed: last 10 reports, last 10 flagged listings, last 10 registrations
Admin-only access (role check)
API: GET /api/admin/stats
Build passes

tasks.title: SEO and structured data
tasks.description: Add proper SEO: (1) metadata on all pages (title, description, og:image), (2) JSON-LD structured data on listing detail pages (RealEstateListing schema), (3) sitemap.xml generation, (4) robots.txt.
acceptanceCriteria: Every page has appropriate <title> and meta description
Listing detail pages have JSON-LD structured data (RealEstateListing)
Homepage has og:title, og:description, og:image meta tags
sitemap.xml at /sitemap.xml listing all public pages
robots.txt at /robots.txt allowing search engines
Build passes

tasks.title: Password reset flow
tasks.description: Implement forgot password / reset password flow. User enters email, receives reset link via AgentMail, clicks link, sets new password.
acceptanceCriteria: Forgot password page at /auth/forgot-password with email input
POST /api/auth/forgot-password sends reset email with HMAC-signed token
Reset page at /auth/reset-password?token=X with new password form
POST /api/auth/reset-password validates token and updates password
Token expires after 1 hour
Build passes
tasks.notes: Follow same HMAC pattern as email verification. Use AgentMail API for sending.

tasks.title: Listing analytics and view tracking
tasks.description: Track listing views properly and show analytics to landlords/agents. (1) Increment viewCount when listing detail page is loaded (debounced, not on every refresh). (2) Show view count on listing cards and detail page. (3) Landlord dashboard shows views over time (simple: just total views per listing).
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/listings/[id] increments viewCount (with basic dedup: don't count same session twice within 1 hour)
View count visible on listing detail page
View count visible on dashboard listing rows (already shown, ensure it updates)
Build passes
